content.text: Unless dissolved earlier pursuant to this Constitution, the term of the House of Representatives shall be five years.
, the term of the House of Representatives may be extended by a Federal Act for a period not exceeding one year in cases where a proclamation or order of a state of emergency is in effect.
The term of the House of Representatives extended under clause
shall ipso facto expire upon the expiry of six months from the date of voidance of the proclamation or order of the state of emergency.
